benefits.description: Calmest he has ever been, clear-headed, reduced irritability and anger at higher testosterone dose (500mg/wk blast)
Resolved fatigue that was present at low testosterone levels

side_effects.description: Brain fog and more irritability at lower prescribed dose of 125mg/wk compared to higher blast dose

protocol_notes: Originally prescribed 125mg/wk testosterone which resolved fatigue but caused more brain fog and irritability. After a year decided to blast at 250mg x2/wk (500mg/wk total) alongside HGH (daily) and HCG (every other day). Reports slim to no side effects after 8-10 weeks at blast dose and greatest sense of calm. Also previously ran 250mg/wk total as an intermediate dose.
